arts.ttl: Fans react to three notable changes Brendan Rodgers made to Celtic starting XI vs St Johnstone
arts.sum: Celtic fans pleased for Callum McGregor, Alex Valle and Alistair Johnston vs St Johnstone The other two notable changes are the return of Alistair Johnston to the Celtic starting lineup and young Alex Valle getting the nod.

arts.ttl: Brendan Rodgers on why he's benched Celtic captain against St Johnstone
arts.sum: Callum McGregor is almost ever-present for Celtic, so his exclusion from the starting XI to face St Johnstone on Sunday will have come as a surprise to many.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Italian giants now make move to secure free transfer who Celtic and Rangers will also send offer to
Brendan Rodgers names his Celtic starting XI to take on St Johnstone
arts.sum: Brendan Rodgers names his Celtic starting XI to take on St Johnstone.

arts.ttl: Luke McCowan shares what he really thinks of VAR and referees at Celtic Park after latest controversies
arts.sum: Celtic’s win over Motherwell was bogged down by two VAR Celtic Park decisions that caused discussion over whether or not Hoops wingers Hyunjun Yang and Daizen Maeda should have been awarded a spot kick in the 4-0 victory. Speaking about match officiating, Luke McCowan has delivered what he thinks of VAR and referees specifically when teams come to Parkhead.

arts.ttl: Celtic team news confirmed vs St Johnstone as Callum McGregor sits out while one star returns
arts.sum: Celtic starting XI : SCHMEICHEL, JOHNSTON, CCV, SCALES, VALLE, BERNARDO, ENGELS, HATATE, YANG, KUHN, KYOGO. Subs : SINISALO, TRUSTY, TAYLOR, PALMA, IDAH, MCCOWAN, MAEDA, RALSTON, MCGREGOR.

arts.ttl: Kasper Schmeichel drops Celtic contract clue as goalkeeper talks '2024 wishlist'
arts.sum: “We have already won a cup final, we lead the league with great and entertaining football and an incredibly solid defence, which I am especially happy about. “ Living in Glasgow and playing for Celtic is fantastic because you really feel that football means a lot to a lot of people.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports show Rangers and Celtic their true worth with A-list extras to set up 'biggest darts game in history'
arts.sum: The broadcasting behemoth has gone all in on their 'Merry Football Dartsmas" push and are leaning on the Glasgow giants

arts.ttl: Celtic 0 St Johnstone 0 LIVE score and goal updates from the Scottish Premiership clash at Celtic Park
arts.sum: It's top vs bottom as Celtic aim to finish a roaring 2024 in style against Simo Valakari's strugglers

arts.ttl: Former Celtic kid now 'first choice' for Dunfermline job
arts.sum: Dunfermline Athletic are targeting Kelty Hearts gaffer Michael Tidser emerging as their top target.
